deep_dive.title: DeepPySR -- A Symbolic Regression Framework with Dynamic Pruning, Pareto Selection, and Hierarchical Composition for Real-World Scientific Discovery
deep_dive.abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) discovers analytical equations from data, yielding glass-box models with directly interpretable formulas, unlike black-box methods that rely on unstable post-hoc tools such as SHAP or LIME. This transparency is crucial in clinical medicine and social science, but SR faces three challenges: high-dimensional inputs, principled selection of Pareto-front formulae, and data irregularities such as multicollinearity and class imbalance. We introduce DeepPySR, which addresses these issues with a dynamic variable-pruning schedule to remove irrelevant features during search, an exponential Pareto selection criterion that eliminates trade-offs between accuracy and complexity, and a multi-layer architecture for hierarchical symbolic composition. On four Feynman physics benchmarks and seven biomedical and social-science datasets, DeepPySR outperforms PySR and baselines on body fat (R$^2$: 0.794 vs.\ 0.702), heart disease (F1: 0.898 vs.\ 0.787), student performance (R$^2$: 0.964 vs.\ 0.948), and Raine BMI (R$^2$: 0.525 vs.\ 0.370), producing interpretable formulas aligned with domain risk factors.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: interpretable symbolic regression framework for scientific discovery
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向科学发现的可解释符号回归框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向科学发现的可解释符号回归框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向科学发现的可解释符号回归框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: DeepPySR introduces dynamic variable pruning, exponential Pareto selection, and hierarchical composition to enhance symbolic regression for real-world scientific discovery.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 符号回归(SR)能从数据中直接发现解析方程，生成玻璃箱模型，但面临高维输入、帕累托前沿选择等挑战。DeepPySR通过动态变量剪枝移除无关特征，采用指数帕累托选择准则平衡精度与简洁性，并利用层次组合处理复杂结构，在真实世界数据集上显著提升发现效率和可解释性，推动了符号回归在医学和社会科学等需要透明模型的领域应用。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 符号回归(SR)能从数据中直接发现解析方程，生成玻璃箱模型，但面临高维输入、帕累托前沿选择等挑战。DeepPySR通过动态变量剪枝移除无关特征，采用指数帕累托选择准则平衡精度与简洁性，并利用层次组合处理复杂结构，在真实世界数据集上显著提升发现效率和可解释性，推动了符号回归在医学和社会科学等需要透明模型的领域应用。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: interpretable machine learning for symbolic regression

deep_dive.title: GAE: Graph-Augmented Evolution for Scientific Discovery via Reinforcement Optimization
deep_dive.abstract: Evolutionary program search guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for automated scientific discovery. However, current approaches are fundamentally constrained by three bottlenecks: structurally blind parent selection, sparse whole-program evaluation rewards, and static mutation operators that fail to adapt during search. We present GAE (Graph-Augmented Evolution), a framework that resolves these limitations through a tightly coupled, three-pillar architecture. First, a relational graph neural network (GNN) parses programs into typed computation graphs, producing structure-aware embeddings. Second, an RL-optimized meta-controller leverages these embeddings to replace blind evolutionary sampling with a directed policy, dynamically selecting optimal parents and mutation directions based on reward history. Third, an online GRPO fine-tuning loop continuously updates the LLM mutation operator at test-time using group-normalized evaluation rewards, directly aligning the model's generation distribution with high-fitness structural edits. We evaluate GAE on a challenging scientific discovery task: symbolic regression for complex nonlinear oscillator systems. By transforming stochastic search into a directed, self-improving trajectory, GAE efficiently discovers closed-form physical equations, consistently matching or outperforming static LLM-driven baselines and achieving state-of-the-art out-of-distribution performance.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: RL-optimized meta-controller for evolutionary program search akin to symbolic regression
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 强化学习优化的元控制器用于进化程序搜索类似符号回归
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 强化学习优化的元控制器用于进化程序搜索类似符号回归
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 强化学习优化的元控制器用于进化程序搜索类似符号回归
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes GAE framework using RL to guide evolutionary program search for scientific discovery addressing program structure via GNN embeddings analogous to symbolic regression with RL.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出GAE框架，利用强化学习优化进化程序搜索，通过图神经网络嵌入解析程序结构，解决了盲目父选择和稀疏奖励问题。实验表明该方法能有效发现科学程序，可视为强化学习驱动符号回归的一种实现，为自动化科学发现提供了新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出GAE框架，利用强化学习优化进化程序搜索，通过图神经网络嵌入解析程序结构，解决了盲目父选择和稀疏奖励问题。实验表明该方法能有效发现科学程序，可视为强化学习驱动符号回归的一种实现，为自动化科学发现提供了新范式。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: deep symbolic optimization with reinforcement learning

quick_skim.title: Explaining Reinforcement Learning Agents via Inductive Logic Programming
quick_skim.abstract: Explainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) seeks to make Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies more transparent and interpretable, a key requirement in safety-critical and human-centric scenarios. However, it is mostly based on user studies, thus targeting the needs of a specific audience and lacking shared evaluation metrics. On the other hand, logic-based approaches within eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) provide compact, human-readable abstractions of decision-making. However, the systematic quantification of the explainability degree of logical representations remains an open problem. This work aims to advance the state of the art in XRL by introducing objective and planning-oriented metrics for policy explainability in RL settings. At the same time, it contributes to the field of logic for XAI by providing a principled way to quantify the explainability of logical rules, moving beyond common-sense assessments and simple propositional fragments. We employ Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) to extract symbolic representations of RL policies and define a novel set of explainability metrics, including activation rate, feature coverage, syntactic distance and semantic distance. These metrics quantify alignment between symbolic rules and agent behavior, the role of features in decision-making, and the evolution of policies during training and across agents in single and multi-agent RL. Experiments across different RL domains show that the proposed metrics highlight action-specific learning dynamics beyond global return, provide fine-grained insights into domain features beyond classical approaches for global feature importance estimation, and uncover coordination, specialization, and adaptation patterns in MARL. Moreover, they provide crucial insights for the transfer and generalization of action-specific policies.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: explainable RL via inductive logic programming; transferable to symbolic regression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过归纳逻辑编程实现可解释强化学习，可迁移至符号回归
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过归纳逻辑编程实现可解释强化学习，可迁移至符号回归
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过归纳逻辑编程实现可解释强化学习，可迁移至符号回归
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces objective metrics for policy explainability in RL using inductive logic programming, a form of explainable RL (XRL). While not directly applied to symbolic regression, the logic-based interpretable approach is methodologically relevant to explainable RL for equation discovery.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出通过归纳逻辑编程为强化学习策略提供可解释性，并引入了客观的量化指标。尽管未直接应用于符号回归，但其基于逻辑的可解释强化学习方法为将XRL应用于方程发现提供了方法论基础，属于可迁移的方法学桥梁。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出通过归纳逻辑编程为强化学习策略提供可解释性，并引入了客观的量化指标。尽管未直接应用于符号回归，但其基于逻辑的可解释强化学习方法为将XRL应用于方程发现提供了方法论基础，属于可迁移的方法学桥梁。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Find papers on explainable reinforcement learning for symbolic regression equation discovery
